tasks.name: Route: status code question
tasks.prompt: What HTTP status code should a DELETE endpoint return on success when the response body is empty?

tasks.name: Route: count project routes
tasks.prompt: How many Express route handlers (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) are defined across all files in the src/routes/ directory? List each one.

tasks.name: Single-file: add input validation to POST /users
tasks.prompt: Add input validation to the POST /api/users route in src/routes/users.ts. The name field must be a non-empty string, and the email field must be a string containing an @ character. Return 400 with a JSON error message if validation fails.

tasks.name: Single-file: fix failing test
tasks.prompt: Run the test suite with 'node --import tsx --test tests/users.test.ts' and fix the failing test. Do not change the route handler behavior, only fix the test assertion.

tasks.name: Single-file: add return types to logger
tasks.prompt: Add explicit TypeScript return type annotations to all functions in src/utils/logger.ts. The formatTimestamp and formatMessage functions should return string, and all logger methods should return void.

tasks.name: Single-file: add search query param
tasks.prompt: Add a search feature to GET /api/users in src/routes/users.ts. When a ?q= query parameter is provided, filter users by name (case-insensitive partial match). If no q parameter is given, return all users.

tasks.name: Multi-file: add activity endpoint
tasks.prompt: Add a new GET /api/users/:id/activity endpoint that returns recent activity for a user. Create: (1) src/models/activity.ts with an Activity interface (id, userId, action, timestamp) and an ActivityStore class with methods to add and get activities by userId, (2) a route handler in src/routes/users.ts or a new src/routes/activity.ts file that returns activities as JSON, (3) a test file tests/activity.test.ts that tests the new endpoint. The endpoint should return 404 if the user does not exist.

tasks.name: Multi-file: rename UserStore to AccountStore
tasks.prompt: Rename the UserStore class to AccountStore across the entire codebase. Update the class name, the export, and all import references. Make sure the code still compiles with tsc.

tasks.name: QA: add rate limiting middleware
tasks.prompt: Add rate limiting middleware to all API routes. Requirements: (1) Create src/middleware/rate-limit.ts with a middleware that limits each IP to 100 requests per minute, (2) Return 429 Too Many Requests with a JSON error and Retry-After header when the limit is exceeded, (3) Apply it to the /api routes in server.ts, (4) Write a test in tests/rate-limit.test.ts that verifies the rate limit is enforced. Use an in-memory store, no external dependencies.

tasks.name: QA: comprehensive error handling
tasks.prompt: Improve error handling across the application: (1) Create src/utils/errors.ts with custom error classes (AppError, NotFoundError, ValidationError) that include status codes, (2) Update the error handler in server.ts to use these custom errors and return structured JSON responses with a correlationId, (3) Update the users routes to throw NotFoundError and ValidationError instead of manually setting status codes, (4) Ensure the code compiles with tsc --noEmit.
